attribute_condition.description: Condition that must be met for the attribute mapping to apply, expressed as a CEL expression.

attribute_mapping.description: Defines the mapping of attributes between the identity provider and Google Cloud, required for workload identity federation.

aws.description: Specifies the configuration for an AWS provider within a workload identity pool, including AWS account details and required attributes for authentication.

description.description: Specifies the detailed information about the workload identity pool provider, including its purpose and any constraints or requirements.

disabled.description: Indicates whether the provider is disabled; if set to true, the provider will not be used for workload identity federation.

display_name.description: Specifies a human-readable name for the identity provider, with a maximum length of 32 characters.

oidc.description: Specifies the OIDC configuration for the workload identity pool provider, including issuer URL, client ID, and other settings. Must comply with OIDC standards.

saml.description: Defines the SAML configuration for the workload identity pool provider, including the required attributes for integrating with the identity provider.

timeouts.description: Defines the duration for create, update, and delete operations, ensuring smooth lifecycle management of the workload identity pool provider.

workload_identity_pool_id.description: Specifies the ID of the Workload Identity Pool to associate with the provider. Must be a valid identifier within the same project.

workload_identity_pool_provider_id.description: Unique identifier for the workload identity pool provider, must match the pattern `[a-z]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])?` and be between 4 and 32 characters.

x509.description: Specifies the configuration for an x509 certificate provider, including certificate details and validation settings.
x509.type: list(object({trust_store: list(object({intermediate_cas: list(object({pem_certificate: optional(string)})),trust_anchors: list(object({pem_certificate: optional(string)}))}))}))
